Run Targets - Northern Water and Cache La Poudre Pipeline

ROSSyndicate

2023-08-28

Purpose

This script loads all necessary packages to run the targets pipeline, then runs it!

Install necessary packages

Define package installer function

package_installer <- function(x) {
  if (x %in% installed.packages()) {
    print(paste0("{", x ,"} package is already installed."))
    } else {
      install.packages(x)
      print(paste0("{", x ,"} package has been installed."))
    }
  }

List packages that need to be checked for install, and walk the function along them all.

packages <- c("tidyverse",
              "reticulate",
              "targets",
              "tarchetypes",
              "nhdplusTools",
              "polylabelr",
              "sf",
              "readxl",
              "googledrive",
              "feather",
              "cowplot")
lapply(packages, package_installer)
## [1] "{tidyverse} package is already installed."
## [1] "{reticulate} package is already installed."
## [1] "{targets} package is already installed."
## [1] "{tarchetypes} package is already installed."
## [1] "{nhdplusTools} package is already installed."
## [1] "{polylabelr} package is already installed."
## [1] "{sf} package is already installed."
## [1] "{readxl} package is already installed."
## [1] "{googledrive} package is already installed."
## [1] "{feather} package is already installed."
## [1] "{cowplot} package is already installed."

Run the targets pipeline and output a network graph.

library(targets)

# run the pipeline
tar_make()

## ✔ skip pipeline [0.338 seconds]

Create a network diagram of the workflow.

tar_visnetwork()
# save the mmd file
writeLines(tar_mermaid(), sep = "\n", "mermaid.mmd")
mmdc -i mermaid.mmd -o mermaid.png -t dark -w 4000 -H 1000
## Generating single mermaid chart

In order to view [legible] text, right click the image and open in a new window.
